hooks.command: echo 'BLOCKED: Use /planner skill instead of EnterPlanMode' >&2; exit 2
INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'plan-db\.sh\s+update-task.*done'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use plan-db-safe.sh for marking tasks done' >&2; exit 2; fi
INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'plan-db\.sh\s+(create|import)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use planner-create.sh instead of plan-db.sh create/import (enforces review gate)' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(plan-specs|plans)/.*\.(yaml|yml|md)$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Only task-executor may edit plan spec files' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+(checkout|switch)' || (echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+branch' && ! echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+branch\s+(-d|-D|--delete|--list|-a|-r)'); then BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = 'main' ] || [ "$BRANCH" = 'master' ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Never create branches on main — use worktree-create.sh' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi
INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'npm\s+run\s+(lint|test|build|typecheck)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use digest scripts instead (test-digest.sh, build-digest.sh)' >&2; exit 2; fi
INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE '\|\s*(tail|head|grep|cat)\b'; then echo 'WARNING: Avoid piping to tail/head/grep/cat — use Read/Grep tools' >&2; fi
INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.claude/settings\.json$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: settings.json is protected' >&2; exit 2; fi
INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'gh\s+run\s+view\s+--log'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use ci-digest.sh instead of gh run view --log' >&2; exit 2; fi
INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE 'gh\s+pr\s+(view|checks)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use pr-ops.sh or ci-digest.sh checks' >&2; exit 2; fi
INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE "UPDATE\s+waves\s+SET\s+status\s*=\s*'done'"; then echo 'BLOCKED: Never set wave status=done directly — use validate-wave (requires Thor)' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE '(^|[;&[:space:]])git[[:space:]]+commit'; then ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$ROOT" ] && [ -x "$ROOT/scripts/platform/secret-scanner.sh" ]; then echo "$INPUT" | "$ROOT/scripts/platform/secret-scanner.sh"; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then LINES=$(wc -l < "$FILE"); if [ "$LINES" -gt 250 ]; then echo "WARNING: $FILE has $LINES lines (max 250). Split this file." >&2; fi; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ]; then LINES=$(wc -l < "$FILE"); if [ "$LINES" -gt 250 ]; then echo "WARNING: $FILE has $LINES lines (max 250). Split this file." >&2; fi; fi

AGENT_NAME=${CONVERGIO_AGENT_NAME:-}; if [ -n "$AGENT_NAME" ]; then DAEMON_URL=${CONVERGIO_DAEMON_URL:-http://localhost:8420}; MSGS=$(curl -sf "$DAEMON_URL/api/ipc/messages?channel=dm:$AGENT_NAME&limit=5" 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$MSGS" ]; then COUNT=$(echo "$MSGS" | python3 -c "import sys,json; msgs=json.load(sys.stdin).get('messages',[]); unread=[m for m in msgs if not m.get('read_at')]; print(len(unread))" 2>/dev/null); if [ "${COUNT:-0}" -gt 0 ]; then echo "INBOX: $COUNT message(s) for $AGENT_NAME. Read with: convergio-bus.sh read $AGENT_NAME" >&2; fi; fi; fi
